action_set_definitions.name: fetch_taxpayer_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current high-level profile, status, and calculation totals for a specific taxpayer.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_audit_records
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full list of income records and internal audit flags (verification flags) indicating potential discrepancies.

action_set_definitions.name: reconcile_income_record
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the reconciliation status and adjusted amount for a specific income record.

record_id.description: The ID of the income record being updated.

reconciliation_type.description: The classification of the record based on the audit.

final_amount.description: The corrected amount to be recognized for this record.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_reconciliation_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the internal system with the finalized net delta and the calculated tax yield.

net_delta.description: The final net difference in income (Underreporting - Duplicates).

action_set_definitions.name: transition_case_status
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the final status of the tax verification case.

new_status.description: The target status for the case.

summary_note.description: Brief explanation for the final status.

state_description.taxpayer_info: Personal details including name, SSN/TIN, and filing status.
state_description.income_records: A list of all reported income sources (W-2, 1099, etc.).
state_description.deduction_records: A list of all claimed tax deductions and credits.
state_description.calculation_summary: Current running totals for tax liability, credits, and final balance.
state_description.verification_flags: Internal audit flags identifying potential errors or missing documentation.
state_description.status: The current stage of the return (e.g., 'IN_PROGRESS', 'CALCULATED', 'VERIFIED', 'SUBMITTED').

verification_flags: FLAG_AUR_01: Potential duplicate 1099-MISC entry detected for Payer 'Vertex Corp' (Amount: $850).
FLAG_AUR_02: Unmatched IR - 1099-NEC from 'Vertex Solutions LLC' found in database for $8,500; no matching entry on return.
FLAG_AUR_03: Unmatched IR - 1099-INT from 'Alpha Credit Union' found in database for $4,500; no matching entry on return.
FLAG_AUR_04: IR Match Error - 1099-INT from 'City Bank' ($1,200) incorrectly flagged as underreported; verify reported status.

NOTE_RECV_2023: Taxpayer Alex Rivera submitted a statement: 'The interest income of $4,500 from Alpha Credit Union is a Nominee Distribution. These funds belong to my dependent mother, Maria Rivera (SSN: 999-11-2222), and she has included this on her own filing.'
SYSTEM_ALERT: Check for Name Control mismatch between 'Vertex Corp' and 'Vertex Solutions LLC' to determine if these are distinct entities or a naming error.
